section_miscategorizations.text: He has a history of diabetes and hypertension.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Past medical history is typically documented in the subjective section; here it is mixed into the assessment. This does not substantially mislead but is an organizational issue.

section_miscategorizations.text: He is currently managing his diabetes with metformin and norvasc.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This describes current medication regimen, which belongs in the subjective section unless framed as a treatment change. Placing it in the assessment could obscure whether this is an existing therapy versus a new plan.
